elements.original_description: A smiling cartoon character holding a smartphone with a glowing 'Pay Now' button on the screen. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon, a smiling cartoon character holding a smartphone with a glowing 'Pay Now' button on the screen, pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, soft lighting, mood: simple and efficient
